title: SPCA back at Outeniqua Family Market
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA)...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA) is thrilled to announce their return to the Outeniqua Family Market, where they will be manning their stall every last Saturday of the month.


> "While we'll have a few goodies for sale, our main mission is to connect with the community," said GRSPCA's marketing and fundraising manager Samantha Trietsch.


If you have questions about the GRSPCA and the work they do, please visit their stall at the market between 08:00 and 14:00, where their team will share insights, stories, and all the wonderful ways to support the animals in their care.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
